caption: A person with short hair, wearing a light-colored shirt, is visible in a small inset window in the upper right corner of a presentation slide. The main part of the slide displays a technical architecture diagram divided into "Edge" and "Cloud" sections. On the left, under "Edge," multiple rows of "HW / SW" labels point to "Event" boxes, which then flow into a large blue vertical block labeled "Log Events Collector (aggregator)." On the right, under "Cloud," a green "Stream Processor" box feeds into both a database icon and an "Analysis" box, which also points to a database icon. The overall image remains static across the frames, with no visible changes in the diagram, the text, or the person's appearance and posture in the inset window.
